agents.name: Finance Analyst Agent
agents.description: Specialized in financial data analysis, invoice processing, and budget forecasting.
capabilities: Read and extract data from PDF invoices

agents.name: DevOps Interface Agent
agents.description: Responsible for interacting with CI/CD pipelines, source control (GitHub/GitLab), and build artifact repositories.

agents.name: IT Security & Compliance Auditor
agents.description: Expert in auditing technical data against corporate security policies and regulatory standards.

agents.name: Documentation & Reporting Specialist
agents.description: Specializes in summarizing technical findings and formatting them into executive-level documents.

tools.name: Live Currency Converter
tools.description: Converts monetary values between currencies using real-time market rates.
tools.use_case: Use this when the user mentions money in different currencies (USD, EUR, etc).

tools.name: GitHub Artifact Retriever
tools.description: Connects to the GitHub API to fetch raw commit data, PR details, and build artifacts.
tools.use_case: Use when needing to verify what code or files are inside a specific release candidate.

tools.name: Enterprise Report Generator (PDF)
tools.description: Converts structured markdown or JSON data into a branded PDF document.
tools.use_case: Use this strictly for the final step of creating a deliverable file.

operations.name: Safe Server Reboot Protocol
operations.description: A strictly defined Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) for restarting production servers.

knowledge.name: Global HR Policy Vector Store
knowledge.description: Contains all employee handbooks, leave policies, and expense reimbursement guidelines.

knowledge.name: 2025 Corporate Security Standards
knowledge.description: The definitive guide on approved libraries, banned dependencies, and compliance thresholds.
